questionHtml: When the data in the table were used to calculate chi-squared, the calculated value was 0.056. The critical value is 3.84. Explain the conclusion that can be drawn from the calculated and critical values for chi-squared.
markschemeHtml:
1. (when the calculated value is smaller than the critical value) there is no significant association between the two species / H0/null hypothesis accepted;
  2. it is random chance if both species are either present or absent in most quadrats;
